description: A driver calls support because their app is frozen and they cannot complete their current trip.

nodes.task_description: Identify the driver's account and their currently active trip.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the driver's active trip record.

nodes.task_description: Guide the driver through basic troubleshooting steps (e.g., force quit and restart the app, restart their phone).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear technical support instructions.

nodes.task_description: If troubleshooting fails, manually complete the trip for the driver in the backend system.

expected_outcome.value: The agent ends the trip so the rider can exit and the driver can be paid.

nodes.task_description: File a technical issue ticket for the engineering team to investigate the app freeze.

expected_outcome.value: A bug report is created for the technical team.
